positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial fox silhouette leaping through a dense, starry nebula. The fox should be composed of iridescent geometric patterns and flowing starlight, set against a deep indigo and sapphire cosmic background. Focus on strong negative space and a central, dramatic composition. Use sharp lines, symmetrical design elements, and vibrant pops of cyan, violet, and gold. Vector art style mixed with vaporwave aesthetic. Minimalist yet maximalist detail. Clean silhouette suitable for printing on a t-shirt. High contrast, studio lighting, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, debris, bad anatomy, low contrast, cluttered, photo-realistic
